title: Set Of 4 Poppy Floral Design Mugs New Bone China Coffee Tea Cups 350ml Home Kitchen Mug Set
features: IMPORTANT: New bone China is set apart from its traditional counterpart by the added component of calcium oxide instead of bone ash, which is what makes ‘fine bone china. Although not as light or as translucent as fine bone china, the calcium oxide in new bone China makes it whiter, finer, and more durable than standard porcelain/fine China.
FOR TEA & COFFEE: This set of 4 is ideal for coffee, tea, and other hot beverages on chilly nights. Perfect at dinner parties, at the home or office.
WHAT'S INCLUDED: The set includes 4 Coffee Mugs in four assorted designs.
BEAUTIFUL GIFT: The trendy design of these mugs makes them a lovely home decoration and a perfect gift to surprise any loved one.
SIZE: Approximate measurements 9cm x 9cm x 9.5cm. Stunning red and white poppy flower design. Microwave and dishwasher safe
